_meta.name: PROVA Onboarding Drip-Campaign
_meta.author: PROVA Systems / Claude Code
_meta.purpose: Drip-Email-Campaign fuer Pilot-SVs basierend auf Trial-Tag + Aktivitaet
_meta.description: Cron-getriggert taeglich um 09:00 UTC. Liest aus Supabase-View 'v_pilot_drip_candidates' welche SVs heute welche Email kriegen. Sendet via Resend (oder PROVA-SMTP). Dedupliziert via audit_trail-Eintrag pro Email-Type+User.

_required_supabase_view.name: v_pilot_drip_candidates
_required_supabase_view.ddl_sketch:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_pilot_drip_candidates AS
SELECT
  w.id AS workspace_id,
  w.billing_email AS email,
  u.name AS vorname,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM (NOW() - w.abo_aktiv_seit))::int AS trial_day,
  w.abo_status,
  w.abo_trial_endet_am,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM auftraege a WHERE a.workspace_id = w.id) AS anzahl_akten,
  (SELECT MAX(last_login_at) FROM users u2 JOIN workspace_memberships m ON m.user_id = u2.id WHERE m.workspace_id = w.id) AS last_login_at,
  (SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM audit_trail a WHERE a.workspace_id = w.id AND a.typ = 'onboarding.email_sent' AND a.details::jsonb->>'template' = $1)) AS email_already_sent
FROM workspaces w
LEFT JOIN workspace_memberships m ON m.workspace_id = w.id AND m.is_active = true
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id
WHERE w.abo_status = 'trial' OR w.abo_status = 'aktiv';

modules.name: Lookup-Pilot-Candidates
modules.output: iterable<{workspace_id, email, vorname, trial_day, abo_status, anzahl_akten, last_login_at}>

routes.filter: (trial_day == 3 OR trial_day == 5) AND last_login_at IS NOT NULL AND anzahl_akten == 0

_subjects.trial-day-2-no-login: Brauchen Sie Hilfe beim ersten Login?
_subjects.trial-day-3-no-akte: Lassen Sie mich Ihnen die erste Akte zeigen
_subjects.trial-day-7-checkin: Erste Woche bei PROVA — wie war's?
_subjects.trial-day-88-final: PROVA-Trial endet in 2 Tagen — noch alles klar?

_re_engagement_logic.5_day_no_login_fallback: Wenn trial-day-2-no-login geskippt wurde (kein Trigger an Tag 2 ueblich? Marcel-Doc-Hinweis): Re-Trigger an Tag 5
_re_engagement_logic.akte_created_after_no_akte_email: Wenn anzahl_akten > 0 nach trial-day-3-no-akte: spaeter no-akte-Reminders skip
_re_engagement_logic.cancel_click_skip_all: Wenn workspace.abo_status = 'gekuendigt': nur trial-day-88-final senden, alles andere skip
_re_engagement_logic.subject_personalization_optional: Vorname-Variants im Subject: 'Marcel, brauchen Sie Hilfe?' — Sprint-Erweiterung wenn Make-Sponsor-Plan
